title: evolvulus glomeratus subsp. euglomeratus
intro: Evolvulus glomeratus subsp. euglomeratus, also known as dwarf morning glory or compact dwarf blue daze, is a flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Evolvulus glomeratus subsp. euglomeratus include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve sleep quality, and provide relief from anxiety and stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
